entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0195.10625] us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired has a value of 10,607 and has been used with the common stock member on the StatementEquityComponentsAxis. This element should not have a value when used with the common stock Member as us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired should not impact common stock.
The Statement of Changes in Equity implies treasury stock is excluded from the opening balance of shares as the opening balance uses a shares outstanding concept. The element TreasuryStockSharesRetired that was used in the roll-forward cannot reduce the shares outstanding. If the roll-forward of shares is based on shares issued the element TreasuryStockSharesRetired can be used but the opening balance share element should be changed to SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued.
The properties of this us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired fact are: Period :2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10625 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - blbxs4a9011426.htm 30292

[DQC.US.0195.10625] us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired has a value of 10,607 and has been used with the common stock member on the StatementEquityComponentsAxis. This element should not have a value when used with the common stock Member as us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired should not impact common stock.
The Statement of Changes in Equity implies treasury stock is excluded from the opening balance of shares as the opening balance uses a shares outstanding concept. The element TreasuryStockSharesRetired that was used in the roll-forward cannot reduce the shares outstanding. If the roll-forward of shares is based on shares issued the element TreasuryStockSharesRetired can be used but the opening balance share element should be changed to SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued.
The properties of this us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired fact are: Period :2024-04-01 to 2024-06-30 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10625 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - blbxs4a9011426.htm 33096

[DQC.US.0195.10625] us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired has a value of 454,441 and has been used with the common stock member on the StatementEquityComponentsAxis. This element should not have a value when used with the common stock Member as us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired should not impact common stock.
The Statement of Changes in Equity implies treasury stock is excluded from the opening balance of shares as the opening balance uses a shares outstanding concept. The element TreasuryStockSharesRetired that was used in the roll-forward cannot reduce the shares outstanding. If the roll-forward of shares is based on shares issued the element TreasuryStockSharesRetired can be used but the opening balance share element should be changed to SharesIssued or CommonStockSharesIssued.
The properties of this us-gaap:TreasuryStockSharesRetired fact are: Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : shares Rule Element Id:10625 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - blbxs4a9011426.htm 30112
